name: Your Name
headline: What you do, in one line — e.g. 'DevRel at Qdrant (open-source vector database)'
goals: What you want out of this meetup — e.g. 'meet AI engineers building RAG / agents who might adopt a vector DB, and founders in the AI-infra space'
avoid: Anyone whose work is clearly unrelated (e.g. consumer social, crypto trading).
